⚡ HOW TO PLAY

  1. Think of any IPL player — past or present
  2. Keep that player in mind throughout the game
  3. Answer each question honestly
  4. Use "Don't Know" if unsure — it helps!
  5. The AI Wicky will guess your player in 8 questions
  6. See if SPINZO reads your mind 🔮
